subject: LIGO/Virgo S190829u: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
submitter: Olivier Minazzoli at LIGO Virgo Collaboration  <olivier.minazzoli@ligo.org>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration and the Virgo Collaboration report:

After human inspection, the trigger S190829u is no longer considered to be
a candidate of interest due to a data quality issue in the LIGO Livingston
detector.
